frost_detail.why_body: AgroMind combines a 20-year frost climatology with a live 14-day ECMWF forecast. We pick the earliest day your crop's frost-tolerance stays safe for the whole germination window.
frost_detail.forecast_subtitle: Daily min/max temperature, rainfall, and per-day frost probability from Open-Meteo ECMWF IFS.
frost_detail.no_data: No prediction available for this crop yet.

me.description_fruit: Investment in orchard modernisation, anti-frost and anti-hail systems, and replanting. 60% of eligible investment covered.
me.description_grain: Investment in seed stock, machinery, and precision-ag tech. Diesel-input top-up available.
me.description_vegetable: Greenhouse modernisation, drip irrigation, protected cultivation. Organic bonus available.

ba.description_fruit: Replanting and modernisation grants for orchards, incl. anti-frost and anti-hail protection.
ba.description_grain: Per-hectare grants for corn, wheat, barley, oats. Diesel and fertiliser input top-up.
ba.description_vegetable: Greenhouse + drip irrigation modernisation grants. Organic bonus available.

rs.description_fruit: 60–75% of investment cost covered for orchard modernisation, anti-frost and anti-hail systems.
rs.description_grain: Seed, fertiliser, machinery, precision-ag tech. 60–75% cover per project.
rs.description_vegetable: Greenhouse and drip-irrigation investment. 60–75% cover; organic bonus available.

field_advisor.title: Field Advisor
field_advisor.subtitle: Actionable tips from your live AI readings — proven, low-cost interventions.
field_advisor.tip_variability_body: NDVI standard deviation across your field is {{stdev}} — noticeably uneven. Walk the weakest zone and check soil compaction, drainage, or patchy emergence.
field_advisor.tip_canopy_body: Mean NDVI {{mean}} is below the vigorous threshold. A split-dose nitrogen application at the next growth stage typically recovers canopy within 2–3 weeks.
field_advisor.tip_mulch_body: Moderate or urgent irrigation deficit detected. A 3–5 cm organic mulch layer (straw, wood chips, green cuttings) cuts evaporation by up to 70%.
field_advisor.tip_rotation_body: Disease pressure is above baseline. Rotate this parcel next season with a non-host crop (legumes for cereals; cereals for solanaceae) to starve soil-borne pathogens.
field_advisor.tip_cover_title: Sow a cover crop after harvest
field_advisor.tip_cover_body: Winter rye or vetch holds the soil, captures nitrogen, and builds organic matter — the single best long-term intervention for Adria soils.
field_advisor.tip_organic_title: Feed the soil, not just the crop
field_advisor.tip_organic_body: Apply 2–3 t/ha of composted manure or green-manure ploughdown each autumn. Organic matter is the foundation of drought resilience.
field_advisor.tip_shade_body: UV index is 7+. Sensitive transplants (tomato, pepper, leafy greens) benefit from 30% shade cloth during midday hours for the first 10 days after planting.
